_note: Generated by pipeline/economics.py — illustrative development-margin/option economics; basis in config.yaml deal_economics. Authored actuals/notes in deal-notes.json. Synthetic + illustrative.

diligence_overhead.note: Per-parcel variable diligence (diligence_usd) sits WITHIN this standing fixed reserve — the fixed+variable split is the institutional-machinery signal, not a solo operator assembling diligence per deal. Illustrative, basis-stated.

assumptions.incentives_note: Section 151.359 sales-tax exemption + Ch. 312 abatement only (Ch. 312 up to 10 yr, local, school districts not eligible). JETI eligibility for data-center end-use is unsettled (Section 403.602); not assumed.
assumptions.sb6_framing: Post-SB 6, large-load interconnection carries per-MW security and study costs borne by the end developer (PUCT Section 25.194 proposed rule, Project 58481; re-check ~July 2026). Direction only — figures not assumed.
assumptions.disclosure: All figures synthetic + illustrative; basis stated per line. Not investment advice.

jv.note: Most assumption-heavy. Energy land is usually leased/sold, not contributed — land-as-equity cuts ITC basis (HoldCo isolation is the workaround). No public energy comp; present as scenario with stated assumptions.
